'''Keldan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] onboard the ''[[Boneyard Rendezvous]]'' who attempted to [[Death/Legends|kill]] [[Ben Skywalker]] on [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]], but returned to the ''Boneyard'' after Skywalker [[Telekinesis/Legends|lifted]] a rock in his way.

{{Char-stub}}
